title: Explosive
description: A mod that adds new and fun ways to explode things!
body:
[![Create a server with bisecthosting!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934f39526ff78f2b5fb690760bbcb3cd08767c0b_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/CoQWS)


# What's it all about?

Explosive adds new ways to explode your friends, mobs or anything else you'd like to explode!

# What's inside the mod?

You can use the new dynamite item to explode your enemies houses or lay destruction to your local village!

Or you can use the new landmine block to create traps or mob farms! Imagination is your only limit!

You can always experiment with the new features and try fun new combinations!
